title: Harvard Personal Genome Project Public Demo Sample
summary: First public human-style walkthrough sample for evidence-bound report demos on openly shared genome data.
usage: drive a full local reporting walkthrough on a public sample
demonstrate PGx and trait sections with explicit caveats
capture CLI-to-report provenance on a real public genome

license.name: Public sharing terms to be verified per sample
license.notes: Choose only samples with clear public reuse terms before adding download locators.

sources.name: Harvard Personal Genome Project Data Portal
sources.notes: Primary source for publicly shared demo candidates.

artifacts.name: sample_manifest
artifacts.description: Chosen public sample identifier, source profile, preferred input row, and reuse notes.

artifacts.name: report_template
artifacts.description: Human-readable report shape reused for the public demo walkthrough.

artifacts.name: intake_walkthrough
artifacts.description: Local-first helper that writes the intake pack for a selected public sample.

caveats: Do not add a sample until its sharing terms are explicit.
Keep probabilistic findings separate from direct variant findings.
